### IREN — HOLD / ADD

**Danny's most actively bullish call on your positions.**

Signal progression over the past 2 weeks:
- **Apr 8:** New daily red candle. Bottoming begins.
- **Apr 10:** Confirmed — *"bottoming process complete when IREN closes above $38.90"*
- **Apr 11:** MUST-READ — 2 new red candles on weekly charts. Upgraded to weekly signal.
- **Apr 16:** *"Red candle from April 8 remains valid unless invalidated by daily close below $35.57"*
- **Apr 18:** MUST-READ — **New weekly red candle.** Described as stabilising $35–$40 then breaking out.

**Action Monday:** If IREN is trading above $38.90, the bottoming process is confirmed and adding is justified per Danny's framework. If it has pulled back toward $35.57, that's support — hold. Close below $35.57 = exit signal.

### SPOT — ⚠️ REVIEW / CONSIDER EXIT

**Danny has gone silent since March 7 — 6 weeks with zero coverage.**

Danny's own rule: *"When a stock remains in a short-term to long-term downtrend, I don't waste time charting it."* He only emails stocks showing bullish signals. Six weeks of silence almost certainly means yellow candles are in force and he's stopped tracking.

What he said when he last covered it (Mar 5–7):
- *"SPOT is displaying a setup strikingly similar to NFLX's whale accumulation phase — sharp correction followed by bottoming."*
- Dr Cat did a video on SPOT (Mar 8).
- The bottoming thesis required a red candle to appear — it evidently never triggered, or was subsequently invalidated.

**Action Monday:** Review your cost basis. The thesis Danny was tracking in Feb/Mar did not complete. Per his methodology, no coverage = yellow candles = do not hold. This is the one position on your list without an active bullish signal. If you're holding at a loss and there's no other thesis, this is the exit candidate.

### GLXY — HOLD / ADD

**Upgraded from "For Viewing Only" to MUST-READ within one week. Dr Cat video released today.**

- **Apr 14–15:** Listed in "For Viewing Only" group alongside MARA, CLSK, MSTR.
- **Apr 16:** Graduated to dedicated email — *"A bullish red ribbon signalling the start of a midterm uptrend is poised to unfold, provided whale accumulation remains strong."*
- **Apr 18:** **MUST-READ** — *"GLXY is forming a W-shaped bottom (double bottom pattern) on the daily chart, which is playing out as anticipated. This classic reversal..."*
- **Apr 19 (today):** Dr Cat released a video this morning on $COIN, $MSTR and **$GLXY** (video 10 of 10 in this week's series).

The upgrade from "viewing only" to MUST-READ + Dr Cat video in one week is one of the stronger escalation signals in Danny's system. The W-bottom completing = right side of the pattern closes above the neckline = that's the add trigger.

**Action Monday:** Hold and watch for the W-bottom neckline confirmation. If GLXY is breaking above the neckline of the double bottom, that's Danny's add signal. Also check whether the Dr Cat video (released today) has specific price levels — worth watching.
